scripts.check: node --check shared/core.js && node --check web/core.js && node --check web/ui.js && node --check web/admin.js && node --check server/src/index.js
scripts.verify:campaign: node -e "const core=require('./shared/core'); let bad=[]; for (const [i,lv] of core.CAMPAIGN.entries()) { const ev=core.evaluate(lv,new Set(lv.solution||[])); if(ev.escaped||ev.score!==lv.target) bad.push({i,name:lv.name,score:ev.score,target:lv.target,escaped:ev.escaped}); } console.log(JSON.stringify({campaignLevels:core.CAMPAIGN.length,bad},null,2)); process.exit(bad.length?1:0);"
